title: You're My Best Friend
meaning_summary: You're My Best Friend remains a durable Queen catalog earner because it is lighter, playlist-friendly, and pairs naturally with the band's larger evergreen hits.
revenue_drivers: sync-friendly friendship and celebration use cases

earnings.assumptions: Estimate is modeled from classic-rock catalog replay, Queen brand demand, and likely split participation.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not modeled as a fully sold song position
ownership.notes: Queen catalog estimates can be sensitive to ownership and administration arrangements.
